mapper.sql: tpi.training_name, tpi.training_method, tpi.training_content, tpi.training_purpose, tpi.training_level, tpi.profession_classify, tpi.dependence_dept, tpi.host_dept, tpi.teacher, tpi.employee_describes, tpi.plan_date, tpi.employee_quantity, tpi.plan_money, tpi.online_flag, tpi.remark, tpi.enabled_flag, tpi.operation_code, tpi.error_msg, tpi.data_status, tpi.group_id, tpi.id, tpi.create_time, tpi.create_by, tpi.update_time, tpi.update_by

${tAlias}.training_name as ${tAlias}_training_name, ${tAlias}.training_method as ${tAlias}_training_method, ${tAlias}.training_content as ${tAlias}_training_content, ${tAlias}.training_purpose as ${tAlias}_training_purpose, ${tAlias}.training_level as ${tAlias}_training_level, ${tAlias}.profession_classify as ${tAlias}_profession_classify, ${tAlias}.dependence_dept as ${tAlias}_dependence_dept, ${tAlias}.host_dept as ${tAlias}_host_dept, ${tAlias}.teacher as ${tAlias}_teacher, ${tAlias}.employee_describes as ${tAlias}_employee_describes, ${tAlias}.plan_date as ${tAlias}_plan_date, ${tAlias}.employee_quantity as ${tAlias}_employee_quantity, ${tAlias}.plan_money as ${tAlias}_plan_money, ${tAlias}.online_flag as ${tAlias}_online_flag, ${tAlias}.remark as ${tAlias}_remark, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_interface (training_name, training_method, training_content, training_purpose, training_level, profession_classify, dependence_dept, host_dept, teacher, employee_describes, plan_date, employee_quantity, plan_money, online_flag, remark, enabled_flag, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, group_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{trainingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingPurpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{professionClassify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dependenceDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{onlineFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into td_plan_interface (training_name, training_method, training_content, training_purpose, training_level, profession_classify, dependence_dept, host_dept, teacher, employee_describes, plan_date, employee_quantity, plan_money, online_flag, remark, enabled_flag, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, group_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by)
select #{trainingName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{trainingMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{trainingContent, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{trainingPurpose, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{trainingLevel, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{professionClassify, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{dependenceDept, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{hostDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, case when #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL} = 0 then 0 else 1 end , #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 'C' , case when #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL} is null then '预计金额为空' else case when #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL} < 0 then '预计金额小于0' else case when #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER} is null then '预计人数为空' else case when #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER} < 0 then '预计人事小于0' else '' end end end end, case when #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL} is null then 'F' else case when #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL} < 0 then 'F' else case when #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER} is null then 'F' else case when #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER} < 0 then 'F' else 'T' end end end end, #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, getdate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, getdate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.update: update td_plan_interface set training_name = #{trainingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, training_method = #{trainingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, training_content = #{trainingContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, training_purpose = #{trainingPurpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, training_level = #{trainingLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, profession_classify = #{professionClassify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dependence_dept = #{dependenceDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, host_dept = #{hostDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher = #{teacher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_describes = #{employeeDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_date = #{planDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_quantity = #{employeeQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, plan_money = #{planMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, online_flag = #{onlineFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
